🎙️ Your DJs

Meet the Voices

Neighbors, friends, and folks who love this valley as much as you do

M

Maggie Rhodes

Morning Host

Sunrise Sessions, weekday mornings. Maggie's been waking up the Valley for three years running.

The Deep End, Tuesday nights. Jesse digs deep so you don't have to sleep.

Kitchen Table, Wednesday evenings. Good conversation, good music, good neighbors.

Wendell Hayes

Weekend Soul

Soul Supper, Saturday nights. Wendell brings the warmth when the sun goes down.

🎵 Sunday Porch Requests

Request Your Song

Tell us your story — a birthday, an anniversary, a memorial, a graduation — and we'll create a custom country song just for you. It airs on our weekly Sunday Porch Requests show.

🎂 Birthdays 💍 Anniversaries 🕊️ Memorials 🎓 Graduations 🎉 Milestones

🌽 Our Story

Built for the Valley

"Music made by us, for us."

Front Porch Radio was born right here in the Nodaway Valley — Fontanelle, Greenfield, and Bridgewater. We believe every community deserves a radio station that knows their name, their road, and their story.

We play country music you won't hear on the big stations. Non-copyrighted artists, AI-generated originals created right here, and the songs that mean something to the people who live here.

We broadcast live at least 3 hours every day, with AutoDJ keeping the music going 24/7. Pull up a chair — you're always welcome on the porch.

LIVE

Broadcasting from the Nodaway Valley

3hrs Live Daily
Free Always
